---
name: 📄 Paper / Project Recommendation
about: Recommend a paper or project to be included in the Awesome Data Agents list
title: "[Recommendation] <System / Paper Name>"
labels: paper recommendation
assignees: ''
---

Thank you for taking the time to recommend a paper or project! We truly appreciate every contribution from the community. Please fill in the fields below as completely as possible to help us review your submission efficiently.


## 📌 Basic Information

**System / Model / Paper Name:**
> e.g., AwesomeDataAgent

**Affiliation / Institution:**
> e.g., The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou) / Tsinghua University / Google Research / ...

**Paper / Project Link:**
> Please provide the primary link (arXiv, ACL Anthology, proceedings page, GitHub, etc.)
> e.g., https://arxiv.org/abs/xxxx.xxxxx

**Publication Venue & Year (if applicable):**
> e.g., VLDB 2024 / NeurIPS 2025 / arXiv 2026 / ...

---

## 📝 Brief Description

> Please provide a concise description of the system or paper. You may describe the mission of your system, any novel architecture, newly proposed agentic collaboration protocols, etc.

---

## 🗂️ Task Scope

> Which data-related task(s) does this work address? Please check all that apply.

**Data Management**
- [ ] Configuration Tuning
- [ ] Query Optimization
- [ ] System Diagnosis

**Data Preparation**
- [ ] Data Cleaning
- [ ] Data Integration
- [ ] Data Discovery

**Data Analysis**
- [ ] Structured Data Analysis
  - [ ] TableQA
  - [ ] NL2SQL
  - [ ] NL2VIS
- [ ] Unstructured Data Analysis
- [ ] Report Generation

- [ ] Other (please describe below)

---

## 🪜 Suggested Autonomy Level

> Please kindly refer to our [taxonomy in the README](../../README.md#-levels-of-data-agents) and [survey paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.23587) for detailed level definitions before making your selection.

- [ ] L0
- [ ] L1
- [ ] L2
- [ ] Proto-L3
- [ ] L3
- [ ] L4
- [ ] L5

**Brief justification for your choice:**
> e.g., "The system autonomously invokes external tools and iterates based on feedback, which aligns with L2."

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] The paper/project is publicly accessible via the link provided.
- [ ] The work is directly related to data agents or LLM-driven data management/preparation/analysis.
- [ ] I have read the existing paper list and confirmed this work is not already included.

---

> We will review your submission and update the list accordingly. Thank you again for helping us maintain a comprehensive and up-to-date resource. We truly appreciate your contribution! 🙏
